creator: jonathan@FreeBSD.org
text:
When I try to run the -CURRENT installer over an existing ZFS setup (to start fresh), the installer stops with the error:

cannot create 'bootpool': pool already exists

This is a true statement, but I was rather hoping the installer would blow away anything it needed to when performing this fresh install. I know how to use zpool and gpart to clean up the existing installation, but new users shouldn't be expected to.
